name: gtm-engineering-command-center
description: Autonomous GTM operating system — multichannel orchestration (Meta Ads CLI + Google Ads google-ads-open-cli read/measure + REST :mutate deploy), AARRR funnel diagnostics, Tribe v2 neural pre-testing, the High-Velocity Advertising (HVA) engine for creative discovery at machine speed (CLEAR decision rule + deterministic scorer + the Vault moat), browser QA (Playwright + Computer Use), cross-channel attribution, codebase-aware asset generation, and Routines for always-on optimization. 15 agents, 28 commands, 16 skills.
